name: FormatStoreHours
description: Takes the full schedule API response body and returns formatted TTS messages in English and Spanish describing store hours. Handles up to any number of events with varied day/time combinations.

inputs.name: scheduleBody
inputs.description: Full JSON response body from GET /schedules/businessHours/{scheduleId}

outputs: {"ttsMessage": "We are open Monday through Friday 7 AM to 9 PM, Saturday and Sunday 9 AM to 9 PM."}
